display_information.name: TP Agent
display_information.description: Hybrid AI for human-in-the-loop CX workflows — alerts, agent-assist, and CX intelligence in Slack.
display_information.long_description: TP Agent brings Teleperformance's CX intelligence into Slack. Get real-time Alerts & Notifications (anomaly and predictive-SLA driven) pushed into your channels with suggested actions, ask the assistant about omnichannel metrics via @mention or DM, swarm around an alert with Human-In-The-Loop escalation, and provision custom AI agents to a channel from your roster. Powered by the TP Orchestrator: Routing & Skilling, Predictive SLA Tracking, and RealTime Monitoring.

slash_commands.description: Post or schedule a daily CX digest in this channel
